seoTitle: Marrawah vs Mawbanna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marrawah and Mawbanna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marrawah and Mawbanna.
heading: Marrawah vs Mawbanna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marrawah, Tasmania and Mawbanna, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mawbanna has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Marrawah (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marrawah or Mawbanna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marrawah has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Mawbanna scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marrawah scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Mawbanna scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marrawah or Mawbanna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mawbanna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
